hero.title: In-Vehicle Power, Built for Real Roads -- and Real Buyers.
hero.description: COSUN (Cosun Global Electronic Manufacturing) is a factory-direct manufacturer of car power accessories and in-vehicle electronics. Since 2010, we have helped wholesalers, brand owners, retailers, and importers launch reliable SKUs that earn repeat orders -- not return tickets.
hero.buyerRealityText: If you have ever been burned by inconsistent batches, unclear specs, or last-minute delays, you are not alone.
hero.supportText: B2B buyers in North America and Europe need three things: predictable quality, compliance-ready planning, and communication that does not waste time. That is exactly what our operation is built to deliver.

featuredProducts.title: Featured Product Entrances
featuredProducts.description: We focus on everyday automotive accessories that sell fast because they solve everyday problems.

items.title: Car cigarette lighter sockets
items.description: 12V/24V replacement and panel-mount. Stable contact design with heat-resistant options.

items.title: USB car chargers
items.description: USB-A/USB-C and PD/QC options with protection design to reduce overheating complaints.

items.title: Phone holders and mounts
items.description: Magnetic and clamp styles built to hold steady over bumps and summer heat.

items.title: Interior accessories
items.description: Cup holders, ashtrays, and organizers designed for high-velocity retail SKUs.

items.title: Temporary parking plates
items.description: Premium feel and clean visibility, ideal for high-velocity retail programs.

items.title: Power adapters, splitters, and cables
items.description: Multi-port expansion designed for safety and stability in daily use.

problems.title: The Problems We Remove
problems.description: If you have dealt with unstable batches or slow feedback, our process is designed to make each run feel repeatable and predictable.

items.title: Inconsistent batches
items.description: Process checkpoints protect batch consistency, so the product you approve is the product your customers receive.

items.title: Unclear specs
items.description: Buyer-first execution means clear specs, clear revisions, and clear next steps without guesswork.

items.title: Last-minute delays
items.description: Fast response culture and launch support keep packaging, labeling, and timelines on track.

whyChoose.title: Why Buyers Choose COSUN
whyChoose.description: A supplier can make a good sample. A factory partner can make the same product again and again at scale.

cards.title: 1) Company Advantages
cards.subtitle: Built for overseas B2B
items: Buyer-first execution with clear specs and revisions.
Launch support for packaging, labeling, and listing details.
Fast response culture on quotes, samples, and feedback.

cards.title: 2) Factory Advantages
cards.subtitle: Built for repeatability
items: Incoming checks, in-process controls, and final verification.
Production flow designed for heat, vibration, and daily use.
Export-ready packaging options for bulk or retail-ready channels.

cards.title: 3) Price Advantage
cards.subtitle: Competitive without surprises
items: Factory-direct pricing with faster decisions and transparency.
Multiple spec tiers to hit target price without killing reliability.
Stable cost control that reduces rework and replacement costs.

audience.title: For Whom We Build
audience.description: Whether you sell through Amazon, regional retail, automotive distributors, or fleet channels, the expectations are the same: the product must look right, fit right, and work reliably every time.

items.title: Wholesalers and importers
items.description: Need stable replenishment and export-ready packaging.

items.title: Brand owners
items.description: Building private-label programs with differentiated designs.

items.title: Retailers
items.description: Demanding consistent appearance and fewer complaints.

items.title: E-commerce sellers
items.description: Who live and die by reviews and return rates.

items.title: Fleet and commercial buyers
items.description: Need stable performance in daily use and harsh conditions.

highlight.title: Factory strength you can show your team
items: 200+ employees with factory-direct production and QC
Export support for North America and Europe
OEM/ODM: design, prototyping, testing, mass production, delivery

pilotToScale.title: Pilot to Scale, Without Quality Surprises
pilotToScale.description: Cheap is expensive when returns start coming in. We help you validate early and unlock better pricing as volumes grow.

cards.title: Pilot order
cards.description: Start with a pilot order to verify fit, finish, and market response.

cards.title: Revision control
cards.description: Lock specs and revisions after validation to protect repeat orders.

cards.title: Tiered pricing for scale
cards.description: Unlock better pricing as volumes grow, without cutting reliability.

compliance.title: Compliance-ready planning (for EU and US buyers)
compliance.description: If you sell under your own brand, your business may be treated as the manufacturer for certain market requirements. We align documentation and labeling planning early.

cards.title: EU RoHS and CE
cards.description: Documentation pathways restricting hazardous substances and indicating conformity.

cards.title: US FCC pathways
cards.description: Support for Certification and Supplier Declaration of Conformity depending on product type.

cards.title: ISO 9001 aligned
cards.description: Quality management system support for vendor onboarding requirements.

compliance.note: We align documentation and labeling planning based on destination market and product configuration.

ordering.title: A Simple, Supplier-Friendly Process
ordering.description: Streamlined for global buyers who need clear steps, reliable timing, and transparent follow-through.
ordering.proTip: Pro Tip: Include MOQ, target deadline, and artwork status in your RFQ to help us return a faster, comparable quotation.
